name: UBA : Populate Multiple VPN Accounts Failed Login from Single IP
notes: Detects when there are multiple, different VPN account login failures from the same source IP address.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : VPN Login Failed
when any of Source IP are contained in any of UBA : Multiple VPN Accounts Failed Login from Single IP - IP
when at least 2 events are seen with the same Source IP and different Username in 1 hour(s)
thresholds: when at least 2 events are seen with the same Source IP and different Username in 1 hour(s)
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Populate Multiple VPN Accounts Failed Login from Single IP on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : VPN Login Failed
AND NOT when any of Source IP are contained in any of UBA : Multiple VPN Accounts Failed Login from Single IP - IP
AND when at least 2 events are seen with the same Source IP and different Username in 1 hour(s)
RED_list: Event name: UBA : Populate Multiple VPN Accounts Failed Login from Single IP
Add the "sourceIP" of the event or flow payload to the Reference Set "UBA : Multiple VPN Accounts Failed Login from Single IP"
